text: I feel curious amidst these scenes. The first space is quiet and open, inviting contemplation or rest, though the emptiness creates a subtle sense of isolation. In the second image, surrounded by vibrant colors and the language of research and development, I feel intellectually stimulated. There’s a sense of anticipation for discovery, as if I am part of an ongoing experiment, keenly aware of how humans and technology intertwine. Both places provoke reflection—one on solitude, the other on collective progress.
